articles.description: Real Madrid's win against Benfica was a "victory for everyone who stands against racism", midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni says.
articles.title: Real Madrid win against Benfica for 'everyone who is against racism'

articles.description: Victor Osimhen and Baris Yilmaz score in extra time as Galatasaray held off a stirring fightback from 10-man Juventus to reach the last 16 of the Champions League, where they will face either Liverpool or Tottenham.
articles.title: Juventus 3-2 Galatasaray (5-7 agg): Italians fight back to force extra time but fall short

articles.description: Co-hosts Sri Lanka are out of the T20 World Cup after collapsing to a 61-run defeat by New Zealand in Colombo.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Sri Lanka out after collapsing to heavy defeat by New Zealand

articles.description: Holders Paris St-Germain beat 10-man Monaco to advance to the last 16 of the Champions League.
articles.title: PSG 2-2 Monaco (5-4 agg): Champions League holders reach last 16

articles.description: Daniel Dubois refuses a fist bump from world champion Fabio Wardley at a lively news conference in London to promote their world title fight in May.
articles.title: Wardley vs Dubois: Daniel Dubois refuses fist bump from world champion Fabio Wardley after face-off

articles.description: An 'awful' decision, or 'always going to be a red'? Why Juventus' Lloyd Kelly's second yellow card became a straight red in his side's Champions League exit at the hands of Galatasaray.
articles.title: Lloyd Kelly: Why Juventus player's second yellow card became 'awful' straight red

articles.description: British number one Jack Draper suffers a second-round loss to Frenchman Arthur Rinderknech on his ATP Tour comeback at the Dubai Tennis Championships.
articles.title: Jack Draper loses to Arthur Rinderknech at Dubai Tennis Championships

articles.description: As Italy faced the embarrassment of having no clubs in the Champions League last 16, Atalanta became the saviours of national reputation - and pride.
articles.title: Champions League: How Atalanta became the 'darlings of Italian football'

articles.description: England's first-choice scrum-half Alex Mitchell is ruled out of the remainder of their Six Nations campaign with a hamstring injury.
articles.title: Alex Mitchell: England scrum-half ruled out of Six Nations

articles.description: Coventry City once again show their mettle to come from behind and beat Sheffield United to move five points clear at the top of the Championship.
articles.title: Sheffield United 1-2 Coventry City: Frank Lampard's side go five points clear
